title: K1RBE's CPvP Pack
description: An unofficial replica of the texturepack used by K1RBE (HT1), featuring maximum visibility and zero clutter during fights.
body:
# K1RBE's CPvP Pack

⚠️ **IMPORTANT DISCLAIMER:** This is an **unofficial fan-made version** of the current used texturepack by **K1RBE**. This project is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or maintained by K1RBE. All credits for the texturepack go to him.

---

## ⚡ Overview
Welcome to the ultimate texturepack configuration for competitive Crystal PvP. This pack is designed to perfectly replicate the look, visual clarity, and overall feel of K1RBE's game. It customizes critical combat elements to give you the perfect oversight during intense crystal fights.

## 🚀 Key Features

* **Visibility:** Specifically designed for optimized CPvP features, low-profile particle effects, cleaner armor/item visibility, and low-fire tweaks so you never lose track of your opponent.



![Overview of what the texturepack looks like in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1597c3bb6e612c61f97ddd873b34c09e56dfe003.gif)

---
If you enjoy using this texturepack, make sure to check out and support K1RBE on his official youtube channel  
https://www.youtube.com/@K1RBE
